title: "Replication value of < 0 or X/Z not legal"

features.name: replication count with small unsigned literal exceeding bit-width capacity
features.description: Code should include a replication expression {N{...}} where N is a small unsigned literal (e.g., 4'd8) whose bit pattern may have high bits set but the value fits within the width

features.name: nested concatenation with replication operator
features.description: Code should include a nested concatenation {{N}{M}} where N is used as a replication count and M is another concatenation expression
